summary: Pipeline Hero Card UI Clarity Improvements - All visual/formatting changes verified. School name and logo now prominently grouped and separated from action title with border separator. Em-dash-separated reason text correctly rendered as bullet points in both PipelineHero and PriorityBoard attention cards.
critical_code_review_comments: PipelineHero.js: School identity row (logo + name) correctly separated from action title with data-testid='hero-school-row' - VERIFIED
PipelineHero.js: Action title has border-top separator (1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06)) and paddingTop: 6px - VERIFIED
PipelineHero.js: Reason text split using split(/\s*[—]\s*/) and rendered as <ul>/<li> with bullet points (•) - VERIFIED
PriorityBoard.js: RecapMoveCard reason text split into bullet points for em-dash separated text - VERIFIED
Mobile viewport (390x844): Hero card renders properly with all 4 bullet points visible - VERIFIED
Progress rail correctly hidden on mobile (sm:flex class) - VERIFIED
CTA button 'Review Action' navigates correctly to school detail page - VERIFIED
Attention cards clickable and navigate to school detail - VERIFIED
Priority/Pipeline view toggle works correctly - VERIFIED
HeroCard.js updated but not currently imported/used by any page component - NOTED (as per agent context)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pipeline Hero Card UI clarity improvements complete. School name/logo now in separate row from action title with border separator. Em-dash text converted to bullet points in both PipelineHero and PriorityBoard components. All navigation and toggle functionality working. HeroCard.js was updated but is not currently imported anywhere.

pipeline_page_loads.details: Pipeline page loads successfully after login, Priority view is default

hero_school_identity_separation.details: School name (UCLA) displayed in separate row with logo, separated from action title by border-top (1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06))

hero_bullet_points.details: 4 bullet points rendered: 'Overdue follow-up needs action; Coach responded', 'momentum is building', 'action overdue', 'follow up needed'

priority_board_bullet_points.details: Attention cards with em-dash text show bullet points (e.g., 'Re-engage Emory University' shows '• No activity for 13 days' and '• re-engage within 24-48 hours')

attention_card_navigation.details: Clicking attention cards navigates to school detail page

mobile_viewport.details: Hero card renders properly at 390x844, all bullet points visible, progress rail hidden (sm:flex)
